Dear [Repair Shop Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to follow up on the laptop I brought in for repair on [Date you dropped off the laptop]. Could you please provide an update on the current **repair status** of my device? I am hoping to get a clearer timeline for completion.

Sincerely,
